name: Data Product Consumption Workflow
description: Trigger a flow from a data product: on event (when new events arrive) or on a configurable cron schedule. Same trigger semantics as queue-driven or cron-driven flows.
use_cases: Downstream flow triggered by a published data product
Scheduled pull from a data product
Event-driven reaction to data product updates

entity.name: {{WORKFLOW_NAME}}
entity.description: Flow triggered by consuming a data product (on event or cron)

connection.description: Connection to the data product to consume (event or cron)

placeholders.{{TEMPLATE_ID}}: System template ID for data product consumption
placeholders.{{CRON_SCHEDULE}}: Cron expression when trigger is cron (null for event trigger)
placeholders.{{DATA_PRODUCT_ID}}: UUID of the data product to consume
